visual_analysis: The application has a clean and modern aesthetic, with an organized layout that allows easy navigation. The use of dark colors with contrasting bright elements provides good visual appeal and clarity, although some areas could benefit from additional visual cues to enhance user experience.
educational_analysis: The content effectively demonstrates the Depth-First Search concept with clear instructional elements like labels and pseudocode. The interactive controls encourage engagement with the educational material, and the accompanying description enhances understanding of the underlying concepts. Overall, the application supports the learning objectives well.
